description: 15 parallel gpt-5.5-fast confirm deep-dives over the remaining 15 of 20 scouted targets (4 confirmed, 9 partial-but-real, 2 refuted: symlinked specs/ hook-tests path, non-leaking reconsolidation env); 13 disjoint-file implement agents fix the confirmed + partial targets across 22 files (sources + added regression tests), fixing only the REAL part of each partial, all stack-verified.
